name: Homemade Fiesta Rub
recipeInstructions: Mix the seasoning. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and use in chili, or on meats and vegetables, as desired.
Use and store. Use the seasoning immediately or transfer the seasoning to an airtight container. Store this rub for up to 1 month.
author: heygrillhey.com
